meaning: n.[生]排卵过度,超数排卵,排卵过速
examples: Superovulation treatments with different level PMSG and HCG on golden hamster were experimented.
The superovulation effects of two gonadotropins in Spring were better than that in Autumn (P<0.01) .
It can be used in ovulation induction alone or used in controlled superovulation induction combined with gonadotrophins.
